title: Peruvian Vegan Causa Rellena
description: A Peruvian-style potato and plantain dish filled with a savory vegan filling, perfect for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: 2. Pierce the potatoes and plantains with a fork a few times and bake for 45-50 minutes, or until they're tender.
3. Scoop out the flesh of the potatoes and plantains and mash them together in a bowl.
4. In a pan, heat some oil and sauté the onion, garlic, and tomato until softened.
5. Add the lima beans, savory spice blend, and vegan mayonnaise to the pan and stir to combine.
6. Add the sautéed mixture to the mashed potatoes and plantains and stir to combine.
7. Scoop the mixture into a serving dish and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
8. To serve, garnish with chopped cilantro and serve cold.
